name: tempad-dev
description: Use the TemPad Dev agent integration to turn selected Figma nodes into repo-ready UI code.

interface.shortDescription: Use Figma selections as agent-ready design evidence.
interface.longDescription: TemPad Dev packages the figma-design-to-code agent skill with MCP server configuration so coding agents can inspect selected Figma nodes and implement project-consistent UI code.
defaultPrompt: Use TemPad Dev to implement the selected Figma node.
Convert this Figma selection into repo-ready UI code.
Inspect the selected Figma node with TemPad Dev.
